errors.networkUnavailable: Unable to reach the API at {{apiBaseUrl}}. Check that the FastAPI backend is running.

quickFilters.description: Click to toggle filters on or off, combine multiple filters, and use Reset to clear the quick-filter slice.

sort.title: Sort
sort.description: Sorting is synchronized with the URL.

notFound.title: Route not found
notFound.description: This local console does not know the route you requested.

sidebar.title: Site workspace
sidebar.sitesError: Failed to load the sites list.
sidebar.noSites: No sites matched the current search.

site.empty: Pick a site to see its workspace status and navigation.

page.title: Jobs and crawl control
page.description: Run local crawls, monitor progress, duplicate proven configs and jump straight into pages, links or audit.

filters.title: Job filters
filters.description: Filter by status or search by job id / root URL. Table headers control sorting.

empty.title: No crawl jobs matched the current view
empty.description: Adjust the filters or create a new crawl job.

form.title: Launch a local audit
form.description: Keep frontend validation light. The backend still validates the payload.

detail.invalidIdMessage: The route does not contain a valid numeric job id.
detail.emptyDescription: The backend returned an empty job response.
detail.title: Crawl job #{{jobId}}
detail.waitingDescription: This job has been created but no pages have been persisted yet. The overview polls automatically while the job is active.

sites.invalidIdMessage: The route does not contain a valid numeric site id.

page.title: Sites and workspaces
page.description: Treat each site as a durable workspace, keep crawls as time snapshots and jump into the active crawl when needed.
page.emptyDescription: Create the first crawl to open a site workspace.

newPage.title: Add a site and launch the first crawl
newPage.description: This is the quick entry point for a new workspace. The `/sites` list remains the main place for managing all site workspaces.
newPage.workspaceDescription: The first crawl creates the durable site workspace, sets the active snapshot, and opens the new shell for that domain.

workspace.label: Workspace
workspace.description: The site remains the durable workspace for future crawl snapshots.

snapshot.label: Snapshot
snapshot.description: The first crawl creates the baseline snapshot without mixing multiple crawls inside the core tables.

navigation.label: Navigation
navigation.description: Once created, you land in the site workspace with the new sidebar, context bar, and site-centric routing.

workspace.emptyDescription: The backend returned an empty site workspace response.
workspace.gscNotConnectedHint: Select a GSC property for this site when you're ready.
workspace.activeCrawlHint: Current working snapshot for the site workspace.
workspace.changesReadyHint: You already have an active and baseline crawl, so compare views remain available under Changes.
workspace.changesWaitingHint: Pick another baseline crawl to activate compare views without making them dominate the whole shell.

progress.title: Are we moving forward?
progress.description: Track progress for the selected site through the active crawl, supporting baseline context, and the most reliable site-level signals we already have.
progress.emptyActiveDescription: Pick an active crawl in the workspace context or run a new snapshot to unlock the progress dashboard.
progress.loadingCompare: Loading change signals for this site.
progress.compareEmptyTitle: Add another crawl to measure change
progress.compareEmptyDescription: The page still shows current-site signals, but improvement and regression lists need a supporting baseline snapshot.

status.title: Active crawl status
status.description: The active crawl remains the working center of the site workspace.

context.title: Comparison context
context.readyDescription: Baseline is available as supporting context, but it no longer dominates the screen.
context.waitingDescription: Progress still works without a baseline, but the change sections stay lighter until another crawl is available.
context.compareReadyDescription: The active crawl can now be compared with baseline crawl #{{id}} under Changes and in the progress signals below.
context.baselineOnlyDescription: Baseline crawl #{{id}} is selected, but compare stays secondary to the current active snapshot.
context.emptyDescription: Run another crawl or pick one from history to unlock the before/after sections.

gsc.title: GSC snapshot
gsc.connectedDescription: The active crawl already has imported GSC coverage for this workspace.
gsc.noDataDescription: The property is connected, but this active crawl still has no imported GSC data.
gsc.notConnectedDescription: Connect a site property to bring GSC signals into the progress view.

kpis.title: Trend KPIs
kpis.description: These cards stay grounded in the current snapshot and only add change context when the data is already stable.

hints.metadataCurrent: Missing title, meta description, or H1 in the active crawl.
hints.opportunitiesWaiting: Opportunity data is still loading for the active crawl.
hints.internalWaiting: Internal linking signals are still loading.
hints.implementedWaiting: Implementation lifecycle data is still loading.
hints.gscWaiting: Import GSC data for the active crawl to unlock this KPI.

improved.title: What improved
improved.description: Focused deltas that show where the active crawl is moving in the right direction.
improved.emptyDescription: The current data does not show a strong positive delta against the baseline.

items.pagesImprovedDescription: Priority improved on {{priorityCount}} URL(s). Internal linking improved on {{internalCount}} URL(s).

worsened.title: What worsened
worsened.description: Concrete regressions to review before the next crawl or implementation cycle.
worsened.emptyDescription: The baseline compare does not show major negative movement right now.

items.auditNewDescription: New or worsened in {{count}} audit section(s).
items.pagesDescription: Priority worsened on {{priorityCount}} URL(s). Content dropped on {{contentCount}} URL(s).
items.implementedDescription: Review recent implementations whose tracked outcome now trends down.

implementation.title: Implementation progress
implementation.description: Recommendation lifecycle for the active workspace, evaluated with the {{window}} outcome window.

hints.active: Recommendations currently open for the active crawl.
hints.implemented: Implemented recommendations tracked in the current scope.
hints.assessed: Improved, unchanged, limited, unavailable, or worsened.

implementation.emptyDescription: Mark recommendations as done to start tracking rollout progress over time.

timeline.title: Recent timeline
timeline.description: A lightweight timeline of the latest crawl, GSC, and implementation events already available in the workspace.
timeline.emptyDescription: This site needs at least one crawl, import, or tracked implementation to build a timeline.

events.activeDescription: Snapshot #{{id}} is the current working crawl for this workspace.
events.baselineDescription: Baseline crawl #{{id}} is available as supporting compare context.
events.gscImportDescription: Pages with clicks: {{clicksPages}}. Pages with impressions: {{impressionsPages}}.

changes.title: What changed between crawls?
changes.description: Use this hub as the main entry point to compare the active crawl against the baseline crawl. It keeps the existing compare semantics, but gathers every compare view under one Changes section.
changes.compareDescription: Open the exact area that changed without leaving the site workspace context.

summary.activeHint: Choose an active crawl to unlock compare context.
summary.baselineHint: Pick a baseline crawl to compare before and after states.
summary.compareAreasReady: All four compare views are available from this hub.
summary.compareAreasWaiting: Compare cards stay parked here until the workspace has a usable baseline.

empty.noActiveDescription: The Changes hub needs an active crawl before it can show what changed between snapshots.
empty.noBaselineTitle: Choose a baseline crawl to compare changes
empty.noBaselineDescription: Set a baseline crawl in the workspace context to unlock compare views and before/after deltas.
empty.unavailableDescription: The current active and baseline context still cannot power compare for this site.

card.noSummary: Summary becomes available here once compare is ready.

pages.title: Pages changes
pages.description: Inspect which URLs are new, missing, improved, worsened or otherwise changed between the active and baseline crawl.

audit.title: Audit changes
audit.description: See which audit sections were resolved, which ones regressed, and where new issues appeared.

opportunities.title: SEO opportunities changes
opportunities.description: Track how opportunities, actionable URLs and priority shifts changed between both crawls.

internalLinking.title: Internal linking changes
internalLinking.description: Review structural regressions and improvements across orphan-like, weakly linked and link equity signals.

overview.newCrawlDescription: Use the dedicated crawl flow to launch another snapshot for this site and keep the workspace context intact.

snapshot.label: Snapshot first
snapshot.description: The next crawl creates a new time-based snapshot for this same site.

workspace.label: Same workspace
workspace.description: You stay in the same site workspace and keep its active, baseline and GSC context.

overview.activeDescription: The active crawl stays at the center of this workspace, while the baseline only adds supporting context.
overview.emptyActiveDescription: Run a new crawl or pick a snapshot from history to build the current-first overview.
overview.kpiDescription: These are the most important numbers from the currently selected crawl.

status.title: Active crawl status
status.description: This snapshot is the working center of the site workspace.

gsc.title: GSC status and summary
gsc.connectedDescription: A GSC property is already attached to the site and can be reused for future crawls.
gsc.emptyDescription: GSC is not connected yet, so the overview is still missing the full search context.

contentGenerator.title: Instructions for content generators
contentGenerator.description: Keep the current site-level writing context close to the active snapshot so it can be reused in Surfer, SEO Writing.ai and future content workflows.
contentGenerator.loadingDescription: Checking the current site-level asset for active crawl #{{crawlId}}.
contentGenerator.loadingWithoutCrawlDescription: Checking whether this site already has generator instructions ready in its persistent store.
contentGenerator.busyDescription: The current site-level asset is being generated from crawl #{{crawlId}}.
contentGenerator.emptyDescription: Generate the first reusable instructions from active crawl #{{crawlId}}.
contentGenerator.emptyWithoutCrawlDescription: Choose a finished active crawl before generating the first reusable instructions for this site.
contentGenerator.noActiveCrawlHint: A finished active crawl is required before generation can start.
contentGenerator.waitForFinishedCrawl: Generation becomes available after active crawl #{{crawlId}} finishes successfully.
contentGenerator.activeCrawlInProgress: Active crawl #{{crawlId}} is still running, so manual regeneration stays disabled until the snapshot finishes.
contentGenerator.failedDescription: The last generation attempt did not complete successfully. Review the error and retry when the active crawl is ready.
contentGenerator.failedFallbackMessage: The request returned a failed asset state. Review the latest error and retry when the active crawl is ready.

actions.regenerate: Generate instructions for content generators again

signals.title: Key signals and next actions
signals.description: These cards answer what needs attention now inside the active snapshot.
signals.noActiveDescription: Without an active snapshot the overview cannot show current KPIs or actionable signals yet.
signals.crawlRunningDescription: The active crawl is still collecting data. Treat the KPIs as a working state and come back as coverage grows.
signals.crawlErrorsDescription: {{count}} crawl errors still need review in the active snapshot.
signals.metadataDescription: {{titleCount}} pages are missing a title and {{metaCount}} are missing a meta description.
signals.internalLinkingDescription: {{brokenCount}} broken and {{redirectCount}} redirecting internal links are still visible.
signals.gscMissingDescription: A GSC property is not attached yet, so the current-first overview is missing search signals.
signals.gscOpportunitiesDescription: {{count}} pages already look like opportunities in the active snapshot.
signals.readyTitle: The snapshot is ready for the next step
signals.readyDescription: The active crawl already has the core technical context and can anchor your next SEO decisions.

shortcuts.title: Workspace shortcuts
shortcuts.description: Jump straight into the next work areas around the active snapshot.
shortcuts.contentRecommendationsDescription: Turn the active snapshot into recommendations based on this site's own data.
shortcuts.competitiveGapDescription: Inspect competitive gaps against the current snapshot and the competitor store.
shortcuts.gscDescription: Manage the site property and import search data into the active crawl.
shortcuts.crawlsDescription: Review crawl history and switch the active or baseline snapshot.
shortcuts.changesDescription: Compare stays a supporting layer on top of the active and baseline crawl, grouped inside one hub.

overview.baselineDescription: An older crawl remains a supporting reference point instead of dominating the overview.
overview.baselineReadyDescription: Baseline crawl #{{id}} is selected and ready to support the Changes section.
overview.baselineWaitingDescription: Pick another crawl as the baseline when you want compare context without rebuilding the overview around it.
overview.historyDescription: Switch the workspace context or jump straight into a concrete snapshot.
overview.emptyHistoryDescription: This site does not have any crawl snapshots yet.
overview.siteSummaryDescription: Lightweight site management context next to the current-first overview.
overview.reuseGscTitle: This site already has a persistent GSC property
overview.reuseGscDescription: New crawls created from this workspace reuse the selected property automatically. Import still runs into the active crawl snapshot.

crawls.emptyDescription: Run a crawl to populate the site history.
crawls.title: Site crawls
crawls.description: Inspect the snapshot history for this site, pick the active crawl, set an optional baseline and launch the next snapshot from one dedicated section.

newPage.title: Launch another crawl snapshot
newPage.description: Create the next snapshot for this existing site without leaving the current workspace.
newPage.siteContextDescription: The new crawl stays inside the same site workspace and reuses its durable context.
newPage.snapshotDescription: You are creating a new snapshot for the same site, not a brand new workspace.

workspace.label: Same workspace
workspace.description: The site remains the durable workspace and keeps its navigation, GSC property and history.

snapshot.label: New snapshot
snapshot.description: A fresh crawl job becomes the next active snapshot after creation, while older crawls stay in history.

newPage.gscDescription: This site already has a selected Search Console property, so you can import data into the new crawl later without reconfiguring the integration.

gsc.emptyDescription: The backend returned an empty site GSC response.

status.noPropertyHint: Choose a Search Console property for this site workspace.
status.noImportHint: No import has been completed for this site yet.
status.noActiveCrawlHint: Pick or run a crawl snapshot before importing data.

overview.title: Google Search Console status
overview.description: See the integration state for this site and whether the active crawl already has imported GSC data.
overview.integrationDescription: Property selection stays site-level and is reused across future snapshots for the same site.
overview.activeCrawlDescription: Imports still go into the active crawl snapshot only.
overview.noActiveCrawl: There is no active crawl selected for this site yet.
overview.summaryDescription: Imported metrics already available for this site workspace.
overview.shortcutsDescription: Jump into the next GSC step or continue analysis from the current site workspace.

cards.noActiveCrawlHint: Choose an active crawl to unlock imports.
cards.rootUrlHint: Site-level property matching stays anchored to the root URL.

settings.title: Configure site property
settings.description: Connect OAuth and choose the persistent Search Console property for this site workspace.
settings.connectionDescription: This setting belongs to the site and is reused by future crawl snapshots in the same workspace.
settings.connectEmpty: Connect Google Search Console before choosing the property for this site.
settings.reuseDescription: Once saved here, the same property is reused by later crawl snapshots. Import still happens separately for each active crawl.
settings.connectionHint: The OAuth connection only unlocks property selection. It does not import data yet.
settings.rootUrlHint: Use a property that best matches this site workspace root URL.

import.title: Import data into the active crawl
import.description: Choose the import window for the active crawl snapshot without changing the site-level property configuration.
import.activeCrawlDescription: This import always writes into the active crawl snapshot selected in the site workspace.
import.lastImportHint: Use the buttons below to refresh the imported data for the active crawl.
import.noPropertyDescription: Site-level property configuration is required before importing GSC data into the active crawl.

gsc.noActiveCrawlDescription: Choose an active crawl in the site workspace before importing GSC data.

overview.title: Content recommendations overview
overview.description: See how many recommendations are active now, how many have already been implemented, and where to continue the workflow.

active.title: Active content recommendations
active.description: Use this working queue to review current recommendations for the active site snapshot.

implemented.title: Implemented content recommendations
implemented.description: Review completed recommendations, lifecycle timing, and outcome status without changing backend semantics.

overview.lifecycleDescription: The same site-level lifecycle is preserved here: active, implemented, too early, and evaluated outcomes when available.
overview.shortcutsDescription: Jump straight into the active queue, implementation history, or related site-level analysis views.
overview.activeNowDescription: {{count}} active recommendation(s) are currently ready for review.
overview.implementedNowDescription: {{count}} implemented recommendation(s) are in scope for lifecycle review.

contentRecommendations.emptyTitle: No content recommendations matched the current view
contentRecommendations.emptyDescription: Try a broader filter set, switch the active crawl, or reset the current view.
contentRecommendations.noActiveCrawlTitle: Content recommendations need an active crawl
contentRecommendations.noActiveCrawlDescription: Choose an active crawl in the site workspace before opening this module.

filters.title: Recommendation filters
filters.description: Keep the site context in the URL and slice the recommendation queue without changing the underlying heuristics.

mix.title: Recommendation mix
mix.description: Counts below come from the same site-scoped own-data heuristic payload as the list and export.

active.title: Active recommendations
active.description: The active queue is still calculated dynamically from the current site workspace and active snapshot.

MISSING_SUPPORTING_CONTENT.title: Missing supporting content
MISSING_SUPPORTING_CONTENT.description: The topic already has a hub or commercial page, but it still lacks supporting informational URLs.

THIN_CLUSTER.title: Thin cluster
THIN_CLUSTER.description: The site touches a topic, but the cluster is still too shallow to support it properly.

EXPAND_EXISTING_PAGE.title: Expand existing page
EXPAND_EXISTING_PAGE.description: An existing URL already shows demand, but content depth or supporting signals are still weak.

MISSING_STRUCTURAL_PAGE_TYPE.title: Missing structural page type
MISSING_STRUCTURAL_PAGE_TYPE.description: The topic has detail pages, but it still lacks a stronger structural hub.

INTERNAL_LINKING_SUPPORT.title: Internal linking support
INTERNAL_LINKING_SUPPORT.description: The content exists, but the cluster needs better internal reinforcement before expanding further.

helper.title: What else can be improved for this URL
helper.noCannibalization: No active cannibalization signals for this URL in the active snapshot.

implemented.title: Implemented recommendations
implemented.description: {{count}} implemented recommendation(s) tracked in the current scope for the active snapshot.
implemented.filtersDescription: Change the evaluation window, filter tracked outcomes, or search a specific recommendation.
implemented.windowApplied: Evaluated with the {{window}} window. Days since implementation: {{days}}.
implemented.tooEarlyMessage: Only {{days}} day(s) have passed since implementation, so the {{window}} window is still too early.
implemented.emptyFilteredDescription: Try a broader window, mode, or search.
implemented.emptyStatusDrilldownTitle: No implemented recommendations for this status
implemented.emptyStatusDrilldownDescription: The summary still reflects the current window, mode, and search scope. Pick another status or clear the drilldown.

overview.title: Competitive Gap Overview
overview.description: A light status view of readiness, competitor coverage, and the latest result state for {{active}}.

strategy.title: Competitive Gap Strategy
strategy.description: Review and maintain the site-level strategy context that guides gap scoring.

competitors.title: Competitive Gap Competitors
competitors.description: Manage the competitor list, their readiness, and the basic site-level setup for this module.

sync.title: Competitive Gap Synchronization
sync.description: Run and monitor competitor sync, semantic processing, and review-linked runtime status for {{active}}.

results.title: Competitive Gap Results
results.description: Work through current gap results, filters, and explanations for {{active}}.

page.title: Competitive gap
page.description: Manual competitors distilled into focused recommendations for {{active}}.

review.outdatedTitle: Review data is not current for the active crawl
review.outdatedMessage: These reviewed or raw records were generated for crawl #{{basisCrawlId}}. The current view is using a safe fallback for active crawl #{{activeCrawlId}}.

reviewRuns.title: Content Gap review runs
reviewRuns.description: Light operator view for recent Content Gap review runs tied to the active snapshot.
reviewRuns.empty: No Content Gap review runs yet.
reviewRuns.outdatedRunHint: This run belongs to crawl #{{crawlId}}, so retry stays disabled for the current active snapshot.

overview.topFiveDescription: The strongest records from the current read model without the full workspace-heavy list.
overview.shortcutsDescription: Jump straight to the subview that matches the next step: strategy, competitors, sync, or results.

overview.discoveryShortcut: Run and inspect persisted discovery runs.
overview.opportunitiesShortcut: Work through Semstorm-backed opportunities with coverage.

discovery.title: Semstorm discovery
discovery.description: Run thin discovery jobs, review persisted competitors, and inspect top query previews before moving into opportunities.

form.title: Run parameters
form.description: Keep this lightweight. The run is synchronous and stores a thin Semstorm snapshot for later read models.

discovery.errorTitle: Failed to load Semstorm discovery runs
discovery.detailErrorTitle: Failed to load Semstorm discovery detail
discovery.emptyDescription: Run discovery to persist Semstorm competitors and their top queries for this site workspace.
discovery.detailEmptyDescription: Choose a persisted run to inspect its competitors and top queries.

runs.title: Recent discovery runs
runs.description: Select a persisted run to inspect the captured Semstorm payload.

detail.title: Run #{{runId}}
detail.description: Thin persisted run snapshot with competitors and top query preview.

opportunities.title: Semstorm opportunities
opportunities.description: Review Semstorm opportunities as a separate site-level layer with coverage and optional GSC signals.
opportunities.filterPanelDescription: The backend keeps filtering thin. Query string state lets you share a specific Semstorm view.
opportunities.noCompletedRunDescription: Run Semstorm discovery first, then return here to inspect opportunities.
opportunities.noActiveCrawlDescription: The site has no active crawl, so coverage and GSC enrichment fall back to empty signals.
opportunities.emptyTitle: No Semstorm opportunities matched the current filters
opportunities.emptyDescription: Reset filters or run a different Semstorm discovery snapshot.

bulkActions.title: Selection and actions
bulkActions.description: {{count}} selected opportunity seeds ready for lifecycle actions.

details.gscSummary: GSC: clicks {{clicks}}, impressions {{impressions}}, CTR {{ctr}}, avg position {{avgPosition}}

promoted.title: Semstorm promoted backlog
promoted.description: Review the thin persisted backlog created from promoted Semstorm opportunities.
promoted.errorTitle: Failed to load promoted Semstorm seeds
promoted.emptyDescription: Promote accepted opportunities to create a durable backlog for the next SEO workflow step.

table.title: Promoted backlog
table.description: Thin persisted seed list for later workflow stages.

semantic.title: Semantic layer
semantic.mergedHint: Related competitor topics were merged into one semantic cluster.

competitiveGap.emptyTitle: No competitive gaps matched the current view
competitiveGap.emptyDescription: Try a broader filter set, add competitors, or reset the current view.
competitiveGap.noActiveCrawlTitle: Competitive gap needs an active crawl
competitiveGap.noActiveCrawlDescription: Choose an active crawl in the site workspace before opening this module.

readiness.title: Data readiness
readiness.ready: The input data is ready for recommendations. If the list is empty, there may simply be no strong gap in the current dataset.
readiness.notReady: The model is still waiting for a fuller competitor dataset or a valid active crawl.
readiness.strategyMissing: The strategy is optional, but adding it helps explain why a recommendation matches the business direction.

semanticDebug.title: Semantic merge debug
semanticDebug.runningHeadline: The semantic layer is still processing
semanticDebug.partialHeadline: The semantic layer is partially ready
semanticDebug.notStartedHeadline: The semantic layer has not started yet
semanticDebug.notStartedMessage: No semantic run has completed yet for the active competitors, so the current state only reflects the local inputs.
semanticDebug.llmMessage: Similar competitor topics were merged by the LLM. Competitor URLs included in those merges: {{count}}.
semanticDebug.mixedMessage: The semantic layer currently mixes LLM decisions with local fallback logic. Competitor URLs merged by the LLM: {{count}}.
semanticDebug.localMessage: The current semantic state comes from local analysis and fallback logic, without a finished LLM merge.
semanticDebug.runtimeHintWorking: Semantic matching is still working. If the heartbeat keeps moving, it is safe to wait a bit longer.
semanticDebug.runtimeHintQueued: Semantic matching is queued and waiting for execution.
semanticDebug.runtimeHintStopped: The last semantic run stopped before finishing. Resume the run to continue from pending work.
semanticDebug.runtimeHintStoppedWithError: The last semantic run stopped before finishing. Check the last error and use Resume to continue from pending work.
semanticDebug.mergedUrls: Competitor URLs merged by the LLM

strategy.title: Strategy brief
strategy.description: Write the business context in plain language. The backend can normalize it for scoring hints, but the gap model stays deterministic.
strategy.placeholder: Describe goals, audience, offers, priorities and any constraints.
strategy.emptyDescription: Add a short brief to improve strategy-fit context. The gap model still works without it.
strategy.notReadyTitle: The strategy is saved, but hints are not ready yet
strategy.notReadyHint: No normalized strategy is available yet. The gap model still works without it.

debug.title: Normalization debug
debug.notProcessedHeadline: The strategy is saved, but normalization was not available

competitors.title: Manual competitors
competitors.description: Keep this light. Add only the domains you want included in the recommendation read model.
competitors.emptyDescription: Add at least one manual competitor to start seeing competitor-backed recommendations.
competitors.syncAllSkipped: {{count}} competitors were already queued or running and were skipped.

review.title: Accepted / rejected URL review
review.description: Detailed pre-semantic gate decisions for this competitor's stored URLs.
review.empty: No records match this review filter.

competitors.partialDataHint: Anything already stored and analyzed still feeds the competitive gap recommendations.
competitors.syncHeadlineIdle: This competitor is waiting for its first sync.
competitors.syncHeadlineQueued: The sync has been queued and is waiting to start.
competitors.syncHeadlineRunning: Sync is running. {{visited}} URLs visited, {{stored}} pages stored so far.
competitors.syncHeadlineDone: {{visited}} URLs visited, {{stored}} pages stored, {{extracted}} pages analyzed.
competitors.syncHeadlineFailed: The sync stopped after visiting {{visited}} URLs. Any stored pages and analyzed results still remain available.
competitors.syncHeadlineStale: The last sync was recovered as stale after a restart. {{stored}} stored pages and {{extracted}} analyzed pages are still available.
competitors.syncHeadlineCancelled: Runtime state was reset. Stored pages and analyzed results remain available.
competitors.summaryStale: Latest run was recovered as stale
competitors.recentRunsDescription: Operator history for this competitor stays lightweight and loads only when expanded.
competitors.recentRunsEmpty: No sync runs are available yet.

errors.alreadyRunning: This competitor is already queued or currently syncing.

emptyStates.noCompetitorsDescription: Competitive gap cannot calculate recommendations until at least one active competitor is added.
emptyStates.noCompetitorPagesTitle: Competitors are added, but they have not been synced yet
emptyStates.noCompetitorPagesDescription: Click Sync on a competitor or use Sync all to store competitor pages for analysis.
emptyStates.noCompetitorExtractionsTitle: Competitor pages are stored, but topic analysis is not ready yet
emptyStates.noCompetitorExtractionsDescription: Wait for page analysis to finish or rerun sync if the previous run ended with an error.
emptyStates.noOwnPagesTitle: The active crawl has no usable site pages to compare against

emptyStates.filtersExcludedDescription: Widen the filters or reset the current view to see the available gap rows.
emptyStates.noRealGapsTitle: No strong gaps are visible after the latest sync
emptyStates.noRealGapsDescription: Competitor data has already been analyzed, but the current site state and scoring do not surface a recommendation yet.

filters.title: Gap filters
filters.description: These filters stay in the URL and reuse the same deterministic payload as the list and CSV export.

sync.title: Synchronization
sync.description: Operational view for sync runs, semantic runtime, retries, and the latest competitor processing state.

mix.title: Recommendation mix
mix.description: Counts below come from the same competitive gap read model that powers the list and the export.

pages.invalidIdMessage: The route does not contain a valid numeric job id.

page.title: Crawled pages for job #{{jobId}}
page.description: Click column headers to sort, keep filters in the URL, and export either the full job or the active slice.

filters.title: Filters
filters.description: The visible state survives refresh and deep-links cleanly from the audit report.

summary.taxonomyDescription: Deterministic page-type counts based on schema, URL patterns, title and H1 signals.

empty.title: No pages matched the current filters
empty.description: Try a broader preset, clear one or more filters, or return to the overview.

gsc.title: GSC columns
gsc.description: Switch between 28d and 90d metrics without widening the table beyond usability.

opportunities.invalidIdMessage: The route does not contain a valid numeric job id.

page.title: Opportunities for job #{{jobId}}
page.description: Work from priority score, impact and effort instead of browsing raw issue lists.

filters.title: Opportunity filters
filters.description: Keep the state in query params and move straight into the matching pages slice.

topPriority.title: Top priority URLs
topPriority.description: Highest-priority pages after combining traffic, issue severity and internal support.

QUICK_WINS.title: Quick wins
QUICK_WINS.description: Pages already ranking in the 4-15 range with traffic potential and fixable snippet or on-page issues.

HIGH_IMPRESSIONS_LOW_CTR.title: High impressions, low CTR
HIGH_IMPRESSIONS_LOW_CTR.description: Pages with strong visibility but weak snippet performance.

TRAFFIC_WITH_TECHNICAL_ISSUES.title: Traffic with technical issues
TRAFFIC_WITH_TECHNICAL_ISSUES.description: Pages already driving demand while still carrying technical debt.

IMPORTANT_BUT_WEAK.title: Important but weak
IMPORTANT_BUT_WEAK.description: Search-visible pages with thin quality signals, content gaps or weak snippet quality.

LOW_HANGING_FRUIT.title: Low-hanging fruit
LOW_HANGING_FRUIT.description: Relatively cheap fixes with practical upside.

HIGH_RISK_PAGES.title: High-risk pages
HIGH_RISK_PAGES.description: Visible pages exposed to noindex, canonical or indexability risk.

UNDERLINKED_OPPORTUNITIES.title: Underlinked opportunities
UNDERLINKED_OPPORTUNITIES.description: Promising pages that lack internal linking support.

empty.topPriorityTitle: No priority URLs matched the current view
empty.topPriorityDescription: Broaden the filters or switch the GSC range.
empty.groupsTitle: No opportunities matched the current view
empty.groupsDescription: Relax one or more filters to widen the current opportunity slice.

siteOpportunities.title: SEO Opportunities
siteOpportunities.description: Use the active crawl as the current-state source of truth for the most important SEO opportunities right now.
siteOpportunities.recordsDescription: Review the surfaced opportunity URLs from the active crawl in the site workspace.
siteOpportunities.emptyTitle: No SEO opportunities matched the current view
siteOpportunities.emptyDescription: Widen the filters or switch the active crawl to inspect another current-state slice.
siteOpportunities.noActiveCrawlTitle: Pick an active crawl to inspect SEO opportunities
siteOpportunities.noActiveCrawlDescription: The current-state opportunities view reads from the active crawl in the site workspace.
siteOpportunities.filtersDescription: Filter the active opportunity snapshot without moving into compare.
siteOpportunities.topRecordsDescription: The highest-signal opportunity URLs surfaced by the active crawl right now.
siteOpportunities.groupsDescription: Use the grouped view to understand which opportunity lanes dominate the active snapshot.
siteOpportunities.groupsEmptyTitle: No opportunity groups matched the current view
siteOpportunities.groupsEmptyDescription: Reset one or more filters to widen the current-state opportunity slice.
siteOpportunities.recordsTableDescription: Review the currently surfaced URLs, keep the active crawl central and jump to compare only when needed.
siteOpportunities.detailsEmpty: Pick a record to inspect its current-state traffic, priority and rationale.

sitePages.description: Inspect the current pages snapshot for {{domain}}.

summaryHints.matchingRows: Rows matching the current filters and sort.
summaryHints.metadataGaps: {{missingTitle}} missing title, {{missingMeta}} missing meta, {{missingH1}} missing H1.
summaryHints.gscCoverage: {{count}} GSC opportunities in the active crawl.

filters.title: Current-state filters
filters.description: Filter the active crawl pages without leaving the current snapshot.

empty.noActiveTitle: Choose an active crawl to inspect pages
empty.noActiveDescription: The current-state pages view reads from the active crawl in the site workspace.
empty.unavailableDescription: The active crawl did not return a pages payload.
empty.filteredTitle: No pages matched the current filters
empty.filteredDescription: Clear one or more filters to widen the active snapshot slice.
empty.detailsTitle: Open a page to inspect details
empty.detailsDescription: The detail panel follows the current selection in the active crawl slice.

siteAudit.description: Inspect the current audit state from the active crawl.

filters.title: Audit filters
filters.description: Filter the current audit sections without losing the active crawl context.

empty.noActiveTitle: Choose an active crawl to inspect the audit
empty.noActiveDescription: The audit view is driven by the current active crawl. Once a crawl is selected, the summary cards and section drilldowns will appear here.
empty.unavailableDescription: The backend returned an empty audit response.
empty.filteredTitle: No audit sections matched the current filters
empty.filteredDescription: Clear one or more filters or widen the page size to inspect a broader slice of the current audit.

internalLinking.invalidIdMessage: The route does not contain a valid numeric job id.

page.title: Internal linking for job #{{jobId}}
page.description: Inspect orphan-like URLs, weakly linked important pages, anchor risks and lightweight link equity proxies from the current crawl graph.

filters.title: Internal linking filters
filters.description: Keep the selected issue slice, sort and query in the URL.

ORPHAN_LIKE.title: Orphan-like
ORPHAN_LIKE.description: URLs with no followed internal support from crawled pages.

WEAKLY_LINKED_IMPORTANT.title: Weak important pages
WEAKLY_LINKED_IMPORTANT.description: Important URLs with too little internal support.

LOW_ANCHOR_DIVERSITY.title: Low anchor diversity
LOW_ANCHOR_DIVERSITY.description: Incoming anchors are too repetitive for the page.

EXACT_MATCH_ANCHOR_CONCENTRATION.title: Exact-match concentration
EXACT_MATCH_ANCHOR_CONCENTRATION.description: Too much incoming anchor text looks exact-match.

BOILERPLATE_DOMINATED.title: Boilerplate dominated
BOILERPLATE_DOMINATED.description: Internal support is dominated by likely nav/footer-style links.

LOW_LINK_EQUITY.title: Low link equity
LOW_LINK_EQUITY.description: Important URLs sit low in the structural link equity proxy.

empty.title: No internal linking issues matched the current view
empty.description: Relax one or more filters to widen the current internal linking slice.

siteInternalLinking.title: Internal Linking
siteInternalLinking.description: Use the active crawl to inspect the current internal linking state.
siteInternalLinking.issuesDescription: Review the current issue rows from the active crawl in the site workspace.
siteInternalLinking.emptyTitle: No internal linking issues matched the current view
siteInternalLinking.emptyDescription: Relax one or more filters to widen the current internal linking slice.
siteInternalLinking.noActiveCrawlTitle: Pick an active crawl to inspect internal linking
siteInternalLinking.noActiveCrawlDescription: The current-state internal linking view reads from the active crawl in the site workspace.
siteInternalLinking.filtersDescription: Filter the active internal linking snapshot without moving into compare.
siteInternalLinking.previewDescription: The most relevant issue rows from the active crawl right now.
siteInternalLinking.issuesTableDescription: Review current issue rows and use Changes only when you want delta context.
siteInternalLinking.detailsEmpty: Pick an issue row to inspect the current internal linking context.

cannibalization.invalidIdMessage: The route does not contain a valid numeric job id.

page.title: Cannibalization for job #{{jobId}}
page.description: Inspect clusters of URLs that overlap on the same GSC queries, identify a dominant URL or the lack of one, and move into the matching pages.

filters.title: Cannibalization filters
filters.description: Keep the selected cluster slice, filters and sort state in the URL.

metrics.strongestSharedQueries: {{count}} shared queries with the strongest competitor

details.notInCluster: This URL does not currently belong to a cannibalization cluster.
details.noOverlapsDescription: This URL has GSC data, but no overlap passed the relevance thresholds.

empty.title: No cannibalization clusters matched the current view
empty.description: Relax one or more filters to widen the current overlap slice.

trends.invalidIdMessage: The route does not contain a valid numeric job id.

page.title: Trends for job #{{jobId}}
page.description: Compare crawl jobs for the same site and contrast imported GSC ranges without leaving the current job context.

crawl.title: Crawl compare
crawl.description: Compare the current crawl against an older baseline for the same site and inspect deterministic change deltas per URL.
crawl.emptyBaselineDescription: Run at least one earlier crawl for the same site to unlock job-to-job comparisons.
crawl.emptyTitle: No crawl changes matched the current filters
crawl.emptyDescription: Relax one or more compare filters or switch to a different baseline job.

filters.title: Crawl compare filters
filters.description: Keep the baseline job, compare range and change filters in the query string.

gsc.title: GSC compare
gsc.description: Compare imported Search Console ranges for the current job and inspect metric deltas per URL.
gsc.emptyTitle: No GSC compare rows matched the current filters
gsc.emptyDescription: Loosen one or more trend filters or import the missing range first.

filters.title: GSC compare filters
filters.description: Keep both ranges and trend filters in the URL for deep-linking.

gsc.invalidIdMessage: The route does not contain a valid numeric job id.

page.title: GSC opportunities for job #{{jobId}}
page.description: Connect one property, import Search Analytics for crawled URLs and work on technical issues next to real query demand.

connection.title: Connection and import
connection.description: This local flow connects one Search Console property for the current site and keeps tokens on disk for development.
connection.topQueriesLimitTooltip: Caps how many query rows are stored for each matched URL during import. It does not increase the number of URLs with queries.
connection.topQueriesLimitHint: Example: 1 keeps only the strongest query for each matched URL. Leave empty to use the backend default.
connection.oauthSuccess: OAuth completed. Choose the matching property and import data.
connection.matchingNote: If GSC shows more URLs than the panel, this view only stores crawled internal pages and matches query data by URL variant. Differences such as trailing slash, protocol, query params, or import failures can exclude a page.

filters.title: Opportunity filters
filters.description: Keep the current range in the URL, combine technical state with GSC thresholds and move straight into top queries.

topQueries.title: Top queries per URL
topQueries.description: Pick a URL from the opportunities table to inspect the exact search demand behind that page.
topQueries.filtersDescription: Filter and sort the imported query rows for the selected URL.

empty.opportunitiesTitle: No URLs matched the current GSC filters
empty.opportunitiesDescription: Broaden one or more thresholds or switch the active GSC range.
empty.topQueriesTitle: Select a URL to inspect top queries
empty.topQueriesDescription: Use the opportunities table above to jump from a technical issue into its Search Console demand.
empty.topQueriesNoRowsTitle: No top queries for the selected URL
empty.topQueriesNoRowsDescription: Import a wider range or loosen one of the active query filters.

links.invalidIdMessage: The route does not contain a valid numeric job id.

page.title: Link graph for job #{{jobId}}
page.description: Move between internal, external and issue-focused slices without losing state on refresh.

filters.title: Filters
filters.description: These map directly to backend filters, including audit deep-link states.

empty.title: No links matched the current filters
empty.description: Clear one or more filters to widen the current link slice.

audit.invalidIdMessage: The route does not contain a valid numeric job id.

empty.title: Audit unavailable
empty.description: The backend returned an empty audit response.

page.title: Technical audit for job #{{jobId}}
page.description: Summary counts on top, issue sections below, and direct links into the matching pages or links tables.

sectionEmpty.title: No records
sectionEmpty.description: This section is currently empty for the selected job.

pagesCompare.emptyTitle: No URLs matched the compare view
pagesCompare.emptyDescription: Adjust filters or change the baseline crawl to inspect another delta slice.
pagesCompare.compareUnavailableDescription: Choose a different baseline crawl to compare the active snapshot.
pagesCompare.title: Pages Changes
pagesCompare.description: Active crawl from {{active}} compared with baseline crawl from {{baseline}}.

filters.title: Compare filters
filters.description: Keep the active snapshot as the base table and layer deltas on top of it.

auditCompare.emptyTitle: No audit sections matched the compare view
auditCompare.emptyDescription: Try another compare status or pick a different baseline crawl.
auditCompare.compareUnavailableDescription: Choose a baseline crawl to compare the active audit against it.
auditCompare.title: Audit Changes
auditCompare.description: Resolved, new and changed issue areas between the active crawl from {{active}} and the baseline crawl from {{baseline}}.

filters.title: Audit compare filters
filters.description: Filter compare sections without losing the site workspace context.

opportunitiesCompare.emptyTitle: No opportunity changes matched the current view
opportunitiesCompare.emptyDescription: Adjust filters or switch the baseline crawl to inspect another working set.
opportunitiesCompare.compareUnavailableDescription: Choose a baseline crawl to compare opportunity shifts.
opportunitiesCompare.title: SEO Opportunities Changes
opportunitiesCompare.description: See which priority opportunities appeared, disappeared or moved between the active crawl from {{active}} and the baseline crawl from {{baseline}}.

filters.title: Opportunities compare filters
filters.description: Focus on the URLs whose priority moved enough to change the action queue.

internalLinkingCompare.emptyTitle: No internal linking changes matched the current view
internalLinkingCompare.emptyDescription: Adjust compare filters or choose another baseline crawl.
internalLinkingCompare.compareUnavailableDescription: Choose a baseline crawl to compare structural changes.
internalLinkingCompare.title: Internal Linking Changes
internalLinkingCompare.description: Track structural improvements and regressions between the active crawl from {{active}} and the baseline crawl from {{baseline}}.

filters.title: Internal linking compare filters
filters.description: Compare issue types and structural signals without leaving the active site workspace.
